rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"convention","text":"Auth test files must follow exact pattern: mock @/getPayload, new JwtService(...), new AuthService(...), vi.clearAllMocks() in beforeEach","scope":"src/api/auth"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"An endpoint that appears unchanged may still have been wrong — register.ts already delegated to authService but was overlooked","scope":"src/api/auth/register.ts"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Consolidation work may reveal the target endpoint was already correct; scope the change to only what is actually broken","scope":"src/api/auth/login.ts"},{"kind":"decision","text":"Delegation pattern (service.login() call) is preferred over inline auth logic in route handlers","scope":"src/api/auth"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Dual auth anti-pattern: endpoints using different mechanisms (in-memory SHA-256 vs Payload PBKDF2) must be unified to one source","scope":"auth"}]}
